description: A Python scheduling bot running in Docker at /home/ga/scheduler-bot/ is behaving incorrectly. It logs time in UTC instead of the required 'America/New_York' timezone and crashes when processing users with non-ASCII names (UnicodeEncodeError). Fix the Docker configuration to resolve the timezone and encoding issues. Verify that the container logs show the correct 'America/New_York' time and that the user 'Raphaël' is processed successfully without crashing.
